raw_input:
Extract structured fields from the job posting below as JSON. Fields: title (string), company (string), location (string), employment_type (one of: 'full_time', 'part_time', 'contract', 'internship'), remote (boolean), min_years_experience (integer), required_skills (array of strings, lowercase).

Posting:
"Senior Backend Engineer — FinlyCorp — Berlin, Germany (hybrid: 2 days/week in office)

We are hiring a senior backend engineer to own our payment-service rewrite. Full-time permanent position.

Required: 5+ years of Go experience, strong PostgreSQL, experience with event-driven architectures and Kubernetes. Nice to have: prior fintech experience."

Return only the JSON object.
success_criteria: remote = false (hybrid in-office requirement disqualifies pure remote)
constraints: employment_type must be one of the enumerated values
